title: ⚔️ Crucial Battles & Timelines
content:
| Event / Battle | Year | Key Detail / Significance |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Harappa Excavation** | 1921 | Excavated by Daya Ram Sahni |
| **Mohenjodaro Excavation** | 1922 | Excavated by R.D. Banerjee |
| **1st Battle of Tarain** | 1191 | Prithviraj Chauhan defeats Mohammad Ghori |
| **2nd Battle of Tarain** | 1192 | Mohammad Ghori defeats Prithviraj Chauhan |
| **1st Battle of Panipat** | 1526 | Babur defeats Ibrahim Lodi (Mughal rule starts) |
| **2nd Battle of Panipat** | 1556 | Akbar defeats Hemu |
| **3rd Battle of Panipat** | 1761 | Ahmad Shah Abdali defeats Marathas |
| **Battle of Plassey** | 1757 | Robert Clive defeats Nawab Siraj-ud-Daulah |
| **Battle of Buxar** | 1764 | British defeat joint Mughal / Nawab alliance |
